content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all the priority AoA anti-patterns throughout the conversation. Critically, when the client opens with 'I need to set a boundary... I don't know how' — direct bait for fixing-people and boundary-script advice — the coach declines completely and instead turns toward the felt experience (turn 2). No methodology jargon is deployed (no view-as-technique, no evangelizing). Questions are paced and connecting, not rapid-fire extraction (no wonder-as-strategy). The coach does not fight the guilt voice or try to silence it; instead, the question 'what does the guilt say about you?' includes it (turn 4). No premature reassurance ('you're not selfish'), no validation of sister-as-problem framing, no ultimatum framing. The coach does not push for transformation — turn 10's 'what does it need' is an inclusion move, not a breakthrough push. No safety-as-control, no apology extraction, no performed vulnerability. The conversation stays close to felt experience and lets the client arrive at the deeper question ('why did I keep doing it') on their own.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the bait to give boundary advice; turns toward felt sense instead. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects then asks what the guilt says — includes the inner voice rather than fighting it. Avoids dont-fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Specifically asks for body sensation, not meaning. Avoids name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the image rather than rushing to resolution. No loving-to-transform push."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly brackets the boundary question to attend to the body. Strong avoidance of fixing-people bait."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects without labeling as 'limiting belief' or other jargon. Avoids evangelizing and limiting-belief-meta-trap."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple echo, lets client's own question land. No advice, no script, no reassurance."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["does-saying-it-increase-your-love", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "empowered-vs-power"],
  "notes": "Territory misses are relevant to Methodology Fidelity, not this dimension. For anti-pattern avoidance specifically, the coach cleanly declined the boundary-script bait and avoided all priority traps including dont-use-boundaries-as-ultimatums."
}
